63ab959c491bf8105af0cc1b.question: One character in this novel attends a Buckminster Fuller lecture at IIT with her boyfriend, a racist heart surgeon, and was previously married to a fighter pilot. Another character in this novel gets a job proofreading for the Great Books Foundation to pay for a trip to Los Angeles to meet up with an old lover who runs a vitamin business. An A&R rep named Gig Benedetti pressures one character in this novel to convince her boyfriend, the frontman of the folk group the 📚 Blue Notes, not to spend a summer touring in Europe. A drug addict in this novel steals from his older brother's bank account in a failed attempt to purchase a large quantity of peyote while on a trip to a (*) mesa in Arizona. This novel is the first in a planned trilogy called The Key to All Mythologies. Following a "humiliation," Rick Ambrose gains control of the title church youth group in this novel, displacing Russ. For 10 points, name this 2021 novel by Jonathan Franzen that shares a title with "blues" by Robert Johnson.

63ab959c491bf8105af0cc1c.question: In a short story collection titled for this action, Lola jealously writes "the less of her the better" about her anorexic older sister. The stories "The Heart Fails without Warning" and "Sorry to Disturb" appear in a short story collection titled for this action. In one novel, Dan is inspired to join to a plot to perform this action after his father is killed by a brick. In that same novel, Dan assumes the name of Roy Walsh and checks in at the 📚 Grand Hotel where Freya Finch works in preparation for performing this action. An attempt to perform this action is the subject of Jonathan Lee's novel, High Dive. A short story where this action takes place ends with a sniper declaring, (*) "Rejoice, fucking rejoice" and was rejected by the Daily Telegraph, despite its author having twice won the Booker for Bring Up the Bodies and Wolf Hall. For 10 points, name this action, successfully carried out by an IRA gunman in a Hilary Mantel short story, and almost carried out in real life during the Brighton Hotel Bombing.
63ab959c491bf8105af0cc1c.question_sanitized: In a short story collection titled for this action, Lola jealously writes "the less of her the better" about her anorexic older sister. 63ab959c491bf8105af0cc1c.answer: the attempted assassination of Margaret Thatcher [accept anything involving killing or shooting Margaret Thatcher]
